description:
Deep antagonistic quality review of `hx-tabs` (T1-16). 6/6 libraries — critical navigation pattern.

Review every file in `packages/hx-library/src/components/hx-tabs/` critically.

**Audit areas:**
1. TypeScript — strict, tab/panel association typing, orientation prop, selectedIndex/value typing
2. Accessibility — `role="tablist"` on container, `role="tab"` on each tab, `role="tabpanel"` on each panel, `aria-selected`, `aria-controls`/`aria-labelledby` linking tabs to panels, roving tabindex (arrow keys navigate tabs, Tab enters panel), axe-core pass
3. Tests — tab selection, keyboard nav (arrows, Tab, Home/End), disabled tabs, dynamic tab addition/removal, scrollable tabs if many
4. Storybook — horizontal/vertical, scrollable overflow, disabled tab, with badges/icons
5. CSS — active tab indicator, `--hx-*` tokens, no hardcoded colors, CSS parts (tab, panel, indicator)
6. Performance — bundle < 5KB
7. Drupal — Twig-renderable, panel content via slots

**Output:** Write findings to `packages/hx-library/src/components/hx-tabs/AUDIT.md` with severity (P0/P1/P2). DO NOT fix — document only. Commit AUDIT.md as your PR.
title: AUDIT: hx-tabs — T1-16 antagonistic quality review
